sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2026-03-16 10:25
- Distance: 5.1 km
- Moving time: 29:17
- Elapsed time: 29:17
- Elevation gain: 98.6 m
- Average heart rate: 163.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 180 bpm
- Average watts: 223.2 W
- Average speed: 10.4 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `163.0 bpm`, ranging from `78.0` to `179.5 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `156.6 bpm` and second-half average HR was `169.5 bpm` (+13.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `171.3 spm`, with a working range of `110.0` to `200.0 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `173.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `169.5 spm` (-3.7 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:48 /km` across `5.053 km` in `29:17` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:43 /km` and second-half pace was `5:51 /km` (+8 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `163.1 bpm` average and `180 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `156.7 bpm` in the first half and `169.3 bpm` in the second (+12.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `29:17` out of `29:17` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `9` stop segments and `1.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `104.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `38.8 m` and `64.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `45.6 m` in the first half and `58.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
